title: Nio Q4 2023 Earnings Results
text: Revenue reached RMB 17.1 billion ($2.4 billion), surpassing analyst expectations of RMB 16.8 billion. This represented 6.5% year-over-year growth but a 10.3% decline sequentially. Vehicle deliveries totaled 50,045 units, exceeding guidance of 47,000-49,000. Growth was 24.95% annually though down 9.72% from Q3. Gross margin was 7.5%, falling short of anticipated 10.2%. The company attributed decline to decreased margin from provision of power solutions as a result of expanded power network, partially offset by improved vehicle margins of 11.9%. Net loss was RMB 5.37 billion, representing 7.2% improvement year-over-year but 17.8% worse than Q3 2023. Adjusted net loss was RMB 4.8 billion. For Q1 2024 guidance: vehicle deliveries 31,000-33,000 units; revenue RMB 10.499-11.087 billion ($1.479-1.562 billion). These projections imply March deliveries of approximately 12,813-14,813 vehicles.
